services.title: Entra app discovery
services.summary: List tenant app registrations and diff vs config (JSON on stdout).

services.title: Entra app deploy
services.summary: Create managed app registrations missing from the tenant.

services.title: Entra app maintain
services.summary: Reconcile redirect URIs and API permissions for managed apps.

next_steps: Run `hdc run infrastructure azure query --` after deploy or maintain.
Grant admin consent in Entra portal when required_resource_access changes.
